# Akademisk Boldklub (AB 1889)

> Akademisk Boldklub (AB 1889) is a Danish football club based in Gladsaxe, founded in 1889. This site covers the men's first team: fixtures and results, squad profiles, club news, membership (MyAB), hospitality, and official brand assets.

AB 1889 plays its home matches at Gladsaxe Stadion. The site is bilingual: Danish at the root path (e.g. `/kampe`), English under `/en/` (e.g. `/en/matches`).

## Club

- [About AB](https://ab.dk/en/about/history): Club history
- [Stadium](https://ab.dk/en/about/stadium): Gladsaxe Stadion
- [Leadership](https://ab.dk/en/about/leadership): Club leadership and staff
- [Contact](https://ab.dk/en/contact): Contact details and address
- [Brand Guidelines](https://ab.dk/en/brand): Official logos, colors, and identity assets

## Team

- [Squad](https://ab.dk/en/squad): Current first-team players and coaching staff
- [Matches](https://ab.dk/en/matches): Fixtures, results, and league standings

## News

- [News](https://ab.dk/en/news): Latest club news and articles
- [News RSS feed](https://ab.dk/en/feed): WordPress-compatible RSS feed

## Get Involved

- [MyAB](https://ab.dk/en/myab): Club membership
- [Community](https://ab.dk/en/community): Community programs
- [Partners](https://ab.dk/en/partners): Club sponsors and partners
- [Events](https://ab.dk/en/events): Watch parties and club events
- [Hospitality](https://ab.dk/en/hospitality): Matchday hospitality packages

## Danish (primary language)

- [Forside](https://ab.dk/): Homepage
- [Kampe](https://ab.dk/kampe): Fixtures and results
- [Holdet](https://ab.dk/hold): Squad
- [Nyheder](https://ab.dk/nyheder): News
